project_title: Aleppo Concrete Rubble Recycling and Aggregate Reclamation
problem: Large quantities of construction rubble from damaged residential areas block transport and redevelopment. The goal is to set up low-cost crushers to turn rubble into building aggregate.

expected_impact.social: Allows safe rebuild of 400+ homes and clears public roads.
expected_impact.environmental: Prevents river dumping of rubble; reuses 85% of structural waste.
expected_impact.economic: Creates 40 local jobs and cuts building material costs by 40%.

project_title: Daraa Solar-Powered Drip Irrigation and Well Management
problem: Daraa agriculture suffers from extreme water shortages. Traditional fuel pumps are expensive due to fuel scarcity. Need to design localized smart solar drip irrigation systems.

expected_impact.social: Restores food supply for 10,000+ local families.
expected_impact.environmental: Reduces groundwater overdraft by 35% using moisture sensors.
expected_impact.economic: Reduces farm fuel costs to zero, increasing monthly farm profit.

project_title: Historical Monument 3D Digitization & Digital Archaeology
problem: Ancient sites are at risk of destruction. The project aims to capture high-resolution laser scans and 3D digital twins of historical monuments in Damascus and Aleppo.

expected_impact.social: Preserves national identity and makes historic ruins accessible globally.
expected_impact.environmental: Zero environmental footprint.
expected_impact.economic: Sets up virtual museum apps, preparing for future tourism recovery.

project_title: Homs Energy Restoration: Solar microgrid design
problem: The target region of Homs requires immediate assistance in energy due to localized post-war damage. Solar microgrid design for rural Ghouta clinics. This project aims to design and implement a solution.

expected_impact.social: Provides critical resource access and stability to 5,000+ local residents in Homs.
expected_impact.environmental: Reduces localized emissions and resources consumption through sustainable local components.
